default.$description: Page canvas — the base background behind all content.

subtle.$description: Subtly differentiated background for alternating or grouped sections.

default.$description: Default container surface — cards, panels, and inputs on the page.

raised.$description: Raised surface for higher-elevation layers (menus, popovers, dialogs). Higher elevation reads lighter in dark mode.

sunken.$description: Recessed surface for wells and inset regions.

muted.$description: Secondary text — supporting copy, captions, metadata.

subtle.$description: Tertiary text — placeholders and disabled labels. The mid-grey reads in both modes.

inverse.$description: Text and icons rendered on an action or solid fill.

default.$description: Default border for inputs, cards, and dividers.

strong.$description: High-emphasis border for focus and selected states.

default.$description: Primary interactive colour — buttons, links, key accents. NSW navy in light, brightened for contrast in dark.

hover.$description: Hover and active state for primary actions.

surface.$description: Success (positive outcomes and confirmations) — tinted background.

text.$description: Success (positive outcomes and confirmations) — readable text on the tint.

border.$description: Success (positive outcomes and confirmations) — border and divider.

solid.$description: Success (positive outcomes and confirmations) — solid fill for badges and icons.

surface.$description: Warning (caution and pending states) — tinted background.

text.$description: Warning (caution and pending states) — readable text on the tint.

border.$description: Warning (caution and pending states) — border and divider.

solid.$description: Warning (caution and pending states) — solid fill for badges and icons.

surface.$description: Danger (errors and destructive actions) — tinted background.

text.$description: Danger (errors and destructive actions) — readable text on the tint.

border.$description: Danger (errors and destructive actions) — border and divider.

solid.$description: Danger (errors and destructive actions) — solid fill for badges and icons.

text.$description: Info (neutral information) — readable text on the tint.

solid.$description: Info (neutral information) — solid fill for badges and icons.
